data.enhanced_question: What is my portfolio performance including total portfolio value, cost basis, net profit/loss, year-to-date (YTD) return percentage, daily change percentage, and 1-year daily historical performance data? Please also provide sector allocation percentages and a breakdown of top 10 holdings by weight.

metadata.enhancement_summary: No specific dashboard blocks were provided. Enhanced the question to request comprehensive portfolio metrics (current value, returns, historical time series, allocation, and holdings) to support a general performance analysis.
